reasons: Baxia directly reduces HP regeneration and shield value, which targets Hilda’s sustain identity.
His durability helps contest her early invade and bush-control pattern.

proof.summary: Hilda wants to reset through bush sustain and shields, while Baxia reduces HP regen and shield value when his skills hit.
worksBestWhen: Baxia contests Hilda early instead of letting her invade freely.
failureCases: Baxia cannot maintain contact with Hilda.
Hilda avoids full fights and only trades briefly from bushes.

reasons: Karrie's Lightwheel Mark true damage based on max HP is strong into durable frontliners.
She can punish Hilda if Hilda fails to instantly reach or burst her.

proof.summary: Hilda relies on durability and sustain to survive trades, while Karrie's stacking true damage threatens high-HP targets.
worksBestWhen: Karrie has peel and space to stack attacks.
Hilda is forced to approach through frontline control.
failureCases: Hilda reaches Karrie before Karrie can stack damage.

reasons: Valir can push Hilda away and slow her chase.
His range and disengage tools make it harder for Hilda to force short melee trades.

proof.summary: Hilda wants to run down targets in melee range, while Valir can knock her back, slow her, and create space.
worksBestWhen: Valir saves Searing Torrent for Hilda's commit.
Valir fights near teammates who can punish the displacement.
failureCases: Hilda flanks from fog and reaches Valir first.
Valir wastes knockback before Hilda commits.

reasons: Kaja can stop Hilda's dive and drag her into team damage.
Suppression is valuable because Hilda depends on movement and short trade timing.

proof.summary: Hilda wants fast melee access, while Kaja can suppress and reposition her during the dive window.
worksBestWhen: Kaja saves Divine Judgment for Hilda's commit.
The team can burst Hilda during suppression.
failureCases: Kaja suppresses Hilda too early before she fully commits.
Hilda has enough backup to turn the fight.

reasons: Franco can punish Hilda's bush play if her path is predicted.
Suppression prevents Hilda from using movement and sustain tempo during a pickoff.

proof.summary: Hilda uses bushes to create pressure and recover, while Franco can punish predictable bush routes with hook or suppression.
worksBestWhen: Allies are ready to burst during Bloody Hunt.
failureCases: Franco loses vision and hooks blindly.
Hilda baits Franco's control before committing.
